synopsis:
This issue is part of the Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters crossover event.

All of Darth Vader's careful scheming and brutal power moves to claim Han Solo's frozen body have one ultimate end goal: Luke Skywalker, the only person who could challenge Vader's primacy at the Emperor's side.

Now everything comes to a head as father closes in on son and Luke finally grasps a shocking truth... one that will shape his destiny forever!
title: Darth Vader (2020) #16
